title: salvinia × delasotae
intro: Salvinia × delasotae, also known as Salvinia auriculata, is a hybrid aquatic fern of the genus Salvinia. This aquatic plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Salvinia × delasotae are numerous, including its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit potential anticancer properties. Salvinia × delasotae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used as a food ingredient in some cultures.
